/usr/bin/clang++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -arch x86_64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/ModulusLiteTests.dir/ModulusLiteTests_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ModulusLiteTests.dir/tests/test_core.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ModulusLiteTests.dir/tests/test_routing.cpp.o -o ModulusLiteTests  libModulusLiteCore.a
